description:
Basically, I'm trying to add as many variations as possible.  I've been looking at the problem attempt paths trying to cover the ones I've missed but its a tricky business.  If you come across a path I haven't put down, or if I've made a mistake, please let me know and I'll fix it.

Cheers.
